paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.32 as of July 23, 2026, representing a decrease of 3.95 percent from the prior close and a decline of 20.9 percent over the last 21 sessions. There have been 3 new news articles about the company in the last 24 hours.

Recent news headlines include discussions of Project Matador, a 17-gigawatt AI campus in the Texas Panhandle, with articles from Environment America and NewsChannel 10 on MSN. Another article from PR Newswire reports on the admission of shares of Common Stock and Total Voting Rights.

There have been various SEC filings from Fermi Inc., including the appointment of new officers, the resignation of director Miles Everson, and the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031. There has been 1 Form 4 filing and 16 proxy solicitation filings in the feed.
